  • Method Details

    • verifyFileWithExtensionDownloadedWithClick

      @Then("^I verify that by clicking (?:a|an|the) (.*?) a new file is downloaded with the extension (.*?)$") public static void verifyFileWithExtensionDownloadedWithClick(String elementName, String fileExtension) throws InterruptedException, IOException
      Performs a click on the given element and uses the DownloadManager to monitor the default (or previously set) download directory and waits for a new file with the given extension to appear.

      Gherkin Example:
      - I verify that by clicking the download link a new file is downloaded with the extension docx

      Parameters:
      elementName - name of the element to click to start the download
      fileExtension - String the file extension to wait for. Do not use a leading period.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - When the thread is interrupted
      IOException - When a file or folder cannot be opened or any generic IO error occurs

    • verifyFileWithExtensionDownloaded

      @Then("^I verify a new file is downloaded with the extension (.*?)$") public static void verifyFileWithExtensionDownloaded(String fileExtension) throws InterruptedException, IOException
      Uses the DownloadManager to monitor the default (or previously set) download directory and waits for a new file with the given extension to appear.

      Gherkin Example:
      - I verify a new file is downloaded with the extension docx

      Parameters:
      fileExtension - String the file extension to wait for. Do not use a leading period.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - When the thread is interrupted
      IOException - When a file or folder cannot be opened or any generic IO error occurs

    • verifyFileWithFilenameDownloadedWithClick

      @Then("^I verify that by clicking (?:a|an|the) (.*?) a new file is downloaded with the name (.*?)$") public static void verifyFileWithFilenameDownloadedWithClick(String elementName, String expectedFilename) throws InterruptedException, IOException
      Performs a click on the given element and uses the DownloadManager to monitor the default (or previously set) download directory and waits for a new file with the given filename to appear.

      Gherkin Example:
      - I verify that by clicking the download link a new file is downloaded with the name example.docx

      Parameters:
      elementName - name of the element to click to start the download
      expectedFilename - String the file extension to wait for. Do not use a leading period.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - When the thread is interrupted
      IOException - When a file or folder cannot be opened or any generic IO error occurs

    • verifyFileWithFilenameDownloaded

      @Then("^I verify a new file is downloaded with the name (.*?)$") public static void verifyFileWithFilenameDownloaded(String expectedFilename) throws InterruptedException, IOException
      Uses the DownloadManager to monitor the default (or previously set) download directory and waits for a new file with the given filename to appear.

      Gherkin Example:
      - I verify a new file is downloaded with the name example.docx

      Parameters:
      expectedFilename - String the filename to wait for. Do not need to fully qualify the path.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - When the thread is interrupted
      IOException - When a file or folder cannot be opened or any generic IO error occurs

    • verifyFileWithDateTimeFilename

      @Then("^I verify the filename contains today's date(?: formatted as )?(.*?)$") public static void verifyFileWithDateTimeFilename(String dateTimePattern)
      Uses the DownloadManager to fetch the most recently downloaded file path. Then verifies the filename contains the current date time in YYYY_MMM_dd format by default or a supplied format.


      Gherkin Example:

      • I verify the filename contains today's date
      • I verify the filename contains today's date formatted as YYYY_MMM_dd_hh:ss:mm

      Parameters:
      dateTimePattern - String an optional datetime pattern

    • clearDownloadsFolder

      @When("I clear all files from the downloads folder") public static void clearDownloadsFolder() throws IOException
      Clears all files from the download directory. Does not delete the directory itself.
      Throws:
      IOException - When the directory is undefined / does not exist, or any generic IO error occurs.

    • verifyFileContentsOfZip

      @Then("^I verify the most recently downloaded zip file( does not)? contains? a file with the extension (.*?)$") public static void verifyFileContentsOfZip(String assertion, String expectedFileType) throws IOException
      Looks inside the most recently downloaded zip file and asserts that it does or does not contain a file with the given extension. This method can find files in subdirectories inside the zip, but not within nested zip files.

      This method is case insensitive for file extension.

      Will behave the same as the steps:

      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains any files with the extension zip
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file does not contain any files with the extension pDf
      Parameters:
      assertion - String " does not" for a negative check, otherwise positive check
      expectedFileType - String the file extension to check for.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • verifyZipContentsFileCount

      @Then("^I verify the most recently downloaded zip file( does not)? contains? (\\d+|any) files?(?: (with extension|containing the name) (.*?))?$") public static void verifyZipContentsFileCount(String assertion, String expectedFileCount, String extensionOrName, String expectedFileTypeOrPartialName) throws IOException
      Looks inside the most recently downloaded zip file and asserts that it does or does not contain a give number of files with an optionally specified extension.

      This method can find files in subdirectories inside the zip, but not within nested zip files.

      This method is case insensitive for file extension.

      This method is case sensitive and partial match for text.


      Gherkin Example:

      Extensions:
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file does not contain any files with extension pDf
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file does not contain any files with extension csv
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains any files with extension txT
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains 1 file with extension csv
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains 10 files
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file does not contain 11 files
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains 0 files with extension doc

      Contains file with partial name:
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains any files containing the name TestPDF.pdf
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains 1 file containing the name TestPDF
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains any file containing the name table.html
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains 1 files containing the name .html
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file does not contain any files containing the name TestPdF.pdf
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file does not contain 1 files containing the name testpdf
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file does not contain any files containing the name tabl.html
      • I verify the most recently downloaded zip file contains 0 files containing the name e.htmL
      Parameters:
      assertion - String " does not" for a negative check, otherwise positive check.
      expectedFileCount - String the number of files we expect. 'Any' indicates that it will check for a count above 0.
      extensionOrName - String whether an extension or name is expected. 'with extension' or 'containing the name'.
      expectedFileTypeOrPartialName - String the optional case-insensitive file extension to limit the check to or case-sensitive partial name to match.
      Throws:
      IOException
